rerun_metadata.rerun_reason: Original walk-forward produced OOS/IS = 6.578, driven by low trade count per fold (4-10 OOS trades) combined with an outsized late-2020 bull-run OOS window. Reducing n_windows from 6 to 3 widens each fold to ~2.1y, giving more trades per IS/OOS half and a more statistically meaningful ratio. Sweep cap also lifted from 50 to 200 for symmetry with the Golden Cross re-run.

composite.explanation: Mixed signals (score 52/100). Some checks support the strategy and others raise concerns — treat the headline return with caution. Deflated Sharpe: probability the edge is real = 0.00. Walk-forward: out-of-sample returns degraded to 0.42× in-sample (degradation ratio).
